candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue row; matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.
Not revenue from operations; financial income, so not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Operating profit metric, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability/working capital item, not revenue.
Deferred revenue/liability item, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct match to cost of sales / COGS.
Acquisition-related one-off cost, not recurring COGS.
Core operating overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component; should be included when selecting components.
Looks like a subcomponent/restatement of personnel costs; avoid alongside parent row to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Other external costs and operating expenses
candidates.why: Broad overhead bucket covering external/admin/operating expenses; good SG&A component.
Could contain overhead but also includes losses/disposals/FX and unusual items in some years; less clean than other buckets.
Subcomponent of other operating expenses and often sparse; not preferred over broader cleaner buckets.
Specific unusual item, not a standard recurring SG&A component.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet gross intangible asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.
Operational statistic, not SG&A expense.
Operational statistic, not SG&A expense.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
Other external costs and operating expenses

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected the cleanest recurring overhead components and excluded COGS, D&A, and the noisier 'Other operating expenses' bucket because it appears to include disposal/FX/unusual items in some years.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related but specifically amortization of capitalized R&D, not a dedicated current-period R&D expense line; also appears below operating income / in supplemental disclosure.
Balance sheet asset gross amount, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.
Balancing item on balance sheet, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line is reported on the income statement. The only R&D-related row is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which is not a current-period R&D expense for PROF mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line; best core XINT component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost from leases; include as additional interest component.
Broader total containing non-interest items such as FX; avoid if granular interest lines exist.
Broader/ambiguous finance expense line and likely overlaps with total finance expenses.
Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Duplicate supplemental disclosure of lease interest; avoid double counting with main lease interest row.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Non-current interest bearing liabilites to credit institutions
candidates.why: Debt balance, not expense.
Liability balance, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Short term interest bearing loans to credit institutions
candidates.why: Debt balance, not expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not period expense row.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used the most granular recurring finance cost rows and avoided broader finance expense totals to reduce FX/non-interest contamination and double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement/comprehensive income allocation row, not balance sheet book equity.
Comprehensive income allocation row, not balance sheet equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner equity exists.
Share count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity to avoid double counting non-controlling interests in BE + MIB.

candidates.why: Income allocation line, but balance sheet minority interest is preferred for stock variable.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label and useful as fallback across years.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet minority-interest labels as a priority list; both appear to represent the same concept across reported years.
